case_title: WILLIAM ARIETTA VS. CHARLIE MCADAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSITANCE - UNLAWFUL DETAINER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARIETTA, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT MCADAMS, CHARLIE DOES 1 TO 5

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARIETTA, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCADAMS, CHARLIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 561 FILLMORE STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA 94117 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70099715)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARIETTA, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCADAMS, CHARLIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ***DEFENDANT ALREADY VACATED THE PREMISES*** $8,450.00 RENT, $577.00 COSTS, $3,726.32 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $506.50 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,246.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
